image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about senescent cells than social media does.
Context visual: Senescent cells are damaged cells that stop dividing but refuse to die.
Escalation visual: They accumulate with age and contribute to aging and disease.
Evidence visual: Studies show that targeting these cells may improve health and longevity.
Payoff visual: But the science is still evolving. More research is needed.
Cta visual: Follow for more insights into the science of our bodies.
